---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

You can download my full CV as a PDF:

[**Download CV (PDF)**](papers/CV_Monica_Agarwal.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

```{=html}
<div style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <iframe
    src="papers/CV_Monica_Agarwal.pdf"
    width="100%"
    height="900px"
    style="border: 1px solid #d4d9e0; border-radius: 4px;">
  </iframe>
</div>
```
